notes: Built from the official TikTok Python SDK client code plus the official yml_files snapshot.
The generated Python SDK is the primary request-shape source because the yml snapshot misses some documented operations.
The yml snapshot still enriches tags, summaries, multipart hints, and a few yml-only operations.
Paths are pinned as /open_api/v1.3/* against https://business-api.tiktok.com.

Get access_token and refresh_token by auth_code. The creator access token is valid for 24 hours and the refresh token is valid for one year.
